King's College London

You are viewing a course in < Mathematics
Postgraduate degree

Find out more

Our Advanced Cyber Security MSc equips you with the skills to design, implement, and manage robust security systems against cyber threats. Whether new to cybersecurity or experienced, you’ll learn key topics like cryptography, ethical hacking, and digital forensics. Combining theory with practical application, this programme prepares you to identify security vulnerabilities, build strong defences and stay ahead in a rapidly evolving field.

More information on this course can be found in the online course website.

The University may make changes to a programme of study or modules. See full disclaimer in our Terms and Conditions.
